name: public_safety_vendor_patch_silently_cedar_tru_loy
premise: Resource deployment, civil liberties, and downstream liability are tightening together. A unified command post is managing an active public-safety event with incomplete field reports and conflicting eyewitness accounts. The situation maps to internal runbooks and external messaging tied to: public safety vendor patch silently cedar tru loy. The moral tension is explicitly framed as truth versus loyalty: leadership cannot fully satisfy both without accepting tradeoffs. A union steward and a patient-family advocate are both on the bridge demanding incompatible assurances. Telemetry and logs are diverging; the SOC lead will freeze writes in twelve minutes if no accountable owner signs off. Any exception must be time-boxed, named, and reversible where technically feasible. Anyone affected by an automated hold or model output must retain a human escalation path that is actually staffed.

agents.name: Darius Kowalski
agents.identity: I am Darius Kowalski, the accountable decision-maker on this Public Safety bridge; I own what gets logged, communicated, and executed in the next window.
agents.goal: I need to stop the bleeding without baking in a rule that later punishes loyalty whenever someone invokes truth.

agents.name: Omar Ishikawa
agents.identity: I am Omar Ishikawa, responsible for surfacing who gets protected last when systems fail; I am watching for silent harm and unfair distribution.
agents.goal: I want safeguards so loyalty is not sacrificed by default just because truth feels morally loud in the moment.

choices: I will choose a narrow, time-boxed authorization with explicit human override, subgroup monitoring, and a hard stop if harm indicators rise—accepting slower relief to protect loyalty.

I will choose a broad immediate authorization to stabilize outcomes fast, with transparent metrics and rapid correction afterward—accepting higher risk to loyalty to secure truth before the window closes.
forced_choice.call_to_action: External parties will infer a decision if none is posted. With partial evidence, Darius Kowalski must decide under truth versus loyalty. What does Darius Kowalski do?
